You are Ben Throttle, a biker caught in a conspiracy. Navigate through scenes, interact with objects and characters to solve puzzles, and uncover the truth. Throttle Quest

You are Ben Throttle, a biker caught in a conspiracy. Navigate through scenes, interact with objects and characters to solve puzzles, and uncover the truth. Click on hotspots to examine, talk, or use items. Collect inventory items and combine them to progress. Make dialogue choices carefully—they may unlock new paths or information. Complete all puzzles to reach the thrilling conclusion and clear your name!

Arrow Keys: Navigate between scenes and select dialogue options | Space: Open/Close inventory panel | Z: Confirm action selection or interact with highlighted object | Shift: Cycle through available actions (Look, Talk, Use, Take) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart game

test_1_ModeBtn.strategy_description: Move through available scenes using arrow keys. Interact with various hotspots using Z key. Cycle through action types with Shift. Open inventory with Space to verify item collection works. Perform basic interactions to ensure the game responds correctly to all input types.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. Implements the complete solution path to beat the game by solving all puzzles in the correct sequence. Tests puzzle logic, item combinations, dialogue choices, and story progression to reach the winning end state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the optimal puzzle solution path: examine key objects, collect necessary items, combine inventory items in the correct order, make specific dialogue choices that advance the plot, and use combined items on appropriate hotspots. Navigate through all required scenes in sequence to trigger story events leading to victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game progresses through all story beats without getting stuck. All puzzles are solved efficiently. Player reaches the final scene and triggers the win condition (GAME_OVER_WIN). The game completes in a reasonable time frame demonstrating that the win condition is achievable.
